case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. DAYZIA STEPHENSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-22-2020 CONTINUED TO DEC-22-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 66201866)
